SHORT NAME: OPRTG_HSP_AMT 

LONG NAME: OPRTG_HSP_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2011. 

This field is derived by accumulating the Claim Operating HSP Amount (CLM_OPRTG_HSP_AMT) that is
